characters: Musclehead Who Dreams of Sinning Against Heaven
events: A time when the color of the sky wasn't fixed, the reason for the sun and moon's rotation was a mystery, and all born creatures trembled in fear of what attacked from outside and the unknown feeling inside
Pointing at the watery lights falling from the sky to the ground, the White Lion declared,  – Kekke
And on that day, the Goblin Race realized something

They had learned the first steps of martial arts through Infernal Divine Power during their training days, became formidable warriors mastering the Infernal Heavens Formation one by one, and finally reached a state where they occupied a seat in the Fire River Council, the elite of the elite
I, Uburka, even defeated death
Every conversation echoes incessantly as a celebration of victorious battles
We are brave, we cry, we respect everything in the world that has fought us, and yet we laugh because we have won and will continue to win
"  While ready to call upon the army of the Death King Family at any moment

"I am the second-ranked hunter of the Ascending City, a warrior of the Aegim Empire, the direct disciple of Heavenly Demon, the Young Master of the Demon Cult, the only moon of the Duke Ivansia's family, the head of the Death King Family, and your—

the rain will stop soon, so don't worry

cause_effect: "  The Goblins enthusiastically sang the Fire play song, and I barely, just barely, dodged the axe swung by Uburka in front of me.
As dozens of goblins struggled to reach the top, the White Lion was there, chin held high, looking up at the dark sky.
Preparing altars and offering sacrifices to appease the wrath of the gods, preparing a sacrificial goblin every rainy season to kill, thus wasting a thousand years.
Thus, [rain] would have become a deity, and the name of [rain] became something much longer and more terrifying, like [The Sweeper of the World] or [The Ruler of Autumn's Terror].
To us, Kekke is not just a simple letter, it's the name of a war we won, and thus, our proud spoils of victory!

events: Uburka, who could have easily dodged my strike, accepted it as if it was a delightful prank
I passed on the lesson I had learned from the master of the Demonic Cult about snowflakes to my son
I realized that those dark clouds were not just rain clouds pushed by the sea breeze

The dark clouds collided engulfing each other's thunder as they clashed  'I wondered why Uburka didn't challenge me to a one-on-one duel but instead attacked with a pack… Perhaps he wanted to fight with Infernal Heavens Formation (魔天法), not Infernal Heavens Demonic Art (魔天神功)
'  The moment I realized this, the sound of summoning rain echoed throughout the jungle
The color of the aura exuded by the Goblins was starkly revealed
Surely, one would not imagine that there have been no deaths

events: He sometimes wondered why these people were acting so absurdly, but then realized the most absurd [Self] was within him, and he became contemplative

A man who already realized who he was, gained further insight from watching a small blacksmith

Especially since I wasnt born suited for this job.

events: Those who starve to death, those who die of dehydration, those who drown in the deep sea and cannot escape, those who have no place to flee and freeze to death in the snowstorm, those who die convulsing on the ground without a chance to utter their last words due to poison, those whose limbs are eaten away by illness with no way to save themselves, those who are beaten to death, those who burn to death, those who take their own lives
Or maybe the head of that Death King Family or something
People starve to death
Regardless of whatever damned deaths happened last night, we have to shoulder our duties and go out today
Until the day comes when no one starves to death, until the cries of agony are no more
The only theft Ive learned is this much, and Im barely surviving on it I cant throw that away and rush to where your screams of Infernal Heavens are heard
An elderly couple who couldnt evacuate in time were swept away by the typhoon, their own roof collapsed on them, and they died
When I see people ignoring the death of others in this place, the blood of Infernal Heavens boils
When I see people just passing by the death of others here, the fangs of Infernal Heavens sharpen

It turns those who ignore screams into bystanders, those who dont help the dying into neglecters, and insists that no human is unrelated to the screams and deaths in this world, posing the danger of slaughtering and annihilating all humans
deaths: Those who starve to death, those who die of dehydration, those who drown in the deep sea and cannot escape, those who have no place to flee and freeze to death in the snowstorm, those who die convulsing on the ground without a chance to utter their last words due to poison, those whose limbs are eaten away by illness with no way to save themselves, those who are beaten to death, those who burn to death, those who take their own lives.
Or maybe the head of that Death King Family or something.
People starve to death!
Regardless of whatever damned deaths happened last night, we have to shoulder our duties and go out today!
Until the day comes when no one starves to death, until the cries of agony are no more?
cause_effect: And those who hold the sword despite and because of their understanding are masters.
They sometimes say they want to die, but their murderous intent has not yet led to actual killing.
Just because they have to survive.
Because they need to stay alive.
But because of you, we have to shed tears even for complete strangers we dont know.
